nodes.label: Improved Images Import Plan - ldraw_id matching (eager-orchid)
Switch LDraw Image Matching to ldraw_id Rationale
nodes.rationale: Rebrickable per-color LDraw archives name PNG files by LDraw geometry id, not by Rebrickable part id. Matching by rebrickable_id only works where the two ids coincide. Switching to ldraw_id unlocks correct image attachment for all parts. Multiple parts can share an ldraw_id (geometric variants) so the lookup returns a collection.

nodes.label: Pre-generate part_colors from Products Rationale
nodes.rationale: part_colors rows only existed when an LDraw render landed on a known part. Pre-generating from products ensures every salable variant gets a render slot. Implemented as INSERT IGNORE ... SELECT from products WHERE productable_type = Part. Also hooked into ImportInventoryJob::handle() for automatic sync on new products.

nodes.label: parts.ldraw_id Schema Addition
nodes.rationale: string(20) nullable, not unique (multiple parts may share an ldraw_id for geometric duplicates), indexed for batch lookups. Populated by extending ImportPartBricklinkNumbersJob to also read external_ids.LDraw from Rebrickable Parts API.

hyperedges.label: LDraw Image Import Planning Chain (cosmic-engine → quick-island → eager-orchid)
